mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 THEN 1 END) as status0, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 THEN 1 END) as status1, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 2 AND is_deleted = 0 THEN 1 END) as status2, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 3 AND is_deleted = 0 THEN 1 END) as status3 FROM oms_order WHERE user_id = #{userId}
